## MS SQL to MariaDB 2.0.1 (Dj-MsSql2Maria)

Convert MS SQL Server `.SQL` scripts, `.BAK` backup files, and `.CSV` data files into MariaDB-compatible SQL — offline, no SQL Server required. Portable single `.exe` for Windows x64.

### What's changed
- 

### Download
`Dj-MsSql2Maria.exe` — single self-contained executable, no install needed.
